message:
feat(fp-frame): add to_dict tight orient, to_series_dict, fix label display (frankenpandas-q4f)

Add 'tight' orient to DataFrame.to_dict() returning comprehensive
representation with columns, index, data, index_names, column_names.
Add to_series_dict() for 'series' orient returning BTreeMap<String, Series>.

Fix display format bug: dict and index orients were using Rust Debug
format ("{label:?}") producing "Int64(1)" instead of "1" for index
label keys. Now uses Display format via label.to_string().

5 new tests. Workspace clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
